headline: Woman's 'Manifesting' Vision Board Is Just Photos Of Her Ex 'Failing' — She Calls It 'Motivation'
summary: The board includes a photo of him with 'bad hair' circled. Her therapist is concerned.
fullBody: Amanda Manifest has a vision board covered in photos of her ex looking 'unhappy.' 'I'm manifesting his downfall,' Amanda explained. Her therapist suggested a 'different approach.' Amanda added more photos. 'It's about alignment,' Amanda said. Her ex is doing fine. Amanda has now added 'revenge body' photos — also of her ex. The board has been removed from therapy. Amanda is 'still manifesting.'
